parameters.name: outputred
parameters.label: Output Red
parameters.description: Specify which input and channel is used as the red channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputredchan
parameters.label: Output Red Channel
parameters.description: The channel to use from the selected input to use as the red channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputgreen
parameters.label: Ouput Green
parameters.description: Specify which input and channel is used as the green channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputgreenchan
parameters.label: Ouput Green Channel
parameters.description: The channel to use from the selected input to use as the green channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputblue
parameters.label: Ouput Blue
parameters.description: Specify which input and channel is used as the blue channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputbluechan
parameters.label: Ouput Blue Channel
parameters.description: The channel to use from the selected input to use as the blue channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputalpha
parameters.label: Output Alpha
parameters.description: Specify which input and channel is used as the alpha channel in the output image.

parameters.name: outputalphachan
parameters.label: Output Alpha Channel
parameters.description: The channel to use from the selected input to use as the alpha channel in the output image.
